title: Extended match stats (corners/shots) loaded but never exposed
evidence: brazilian_soccer/data_loader.py:53-57 populates home_corners/away_corners/home_shots/away_shots on Match, but no SoccerKB method or service/server tool reads them
suggestion: Either drop the unused fields or add a tool surfacing corner/shot aggregates

title: Player position filter requires exact FIFA position code
evidence: brazilian_soccer/knowledge_base.py:249 — `position.strip().lower() != p.position.lower()` exact match; natural-language terms like 'forward' won't match codes such as ST/LW/CF (cf. TASK.md 'Show me all forwards from São Paulo FC')
suggestion: Map position groups (forward/midfielder/defender/keeper) to the underlying FIFA codes

title: Integration tests silently skip when data/kaggle is absent
evidence: tests/test_integration.py:15-18 — `pytestmark = pytest.mark.skipif(not os.path.isdir(DATA_DIR))`; here the datasets are present so the module ran (counted in the 95% coverage), but a packaging that omits data would drop ~27 tests with no failure
suggestion: Keep as-is for CI portability, but document that full coverage requires the data fixtures

title: Server stdio entrypoint (run loop) is uncovered
evidence: brazilian_soccer/server.py:130-136 main()/server.run() — server.py at 78% coverage; tool registration and tool calls are tested (tests/test_server.py) but the process run() path and DEFAULT_DATA_DIR load branch are not
suggestion: Acceptable for an stdio entrypoint; optionally add a smoke test that build_server().run is invocable
